name: spacing-editor
description: Visual spacing editor for margin and padding with CSS variable support and automatic theme adaptation
author: Spwig

1.0.2: Replaced all hard-coded colors with admin theme CSS variables
Visual editor margin now uses --info-color/--primary-color (blue) instead of hard-coded #3b82f6
Visual editor padding now uses --success-color (green) instead of hard-coded #22c55e
Visual editor content area now uses --warning-color (orange) instead of hard-coded #f97316
Focus states now use theme-adaptive color-mix() instead of hard-coded rgba() values
Drag handles now use theme-adaptive backgrounds and borders
Improved dark theme compatibility through consistent use of admin theme tokens
1.0.1: Added propertyKey option for element-specific routing
1.0.0: Initial release with visual spacing editor
Support for margin and padding editing
